title: Quantum Knowledge Graph: Modeling Context-Dependent Triplet Validity
summary: Knowledge graphs (KGs) are increasingly used to support large lan guage model (LLM) reasoning, but standard triplet-based KGs treat each relation as globally valid. In many settings, whether a relation should count as evidence depends on...
